result.stdout:
Description:
  The MSBuild-based build framework to use in CI/CD systems
  Version: 7.4.1.12
  More: https://heleonix.github.io/docs/api/Heleonix.Build/intro.html

Options:
  --exe        Optionally specifies a custom installation path to the dotnet.exe to use.
  -h|--help    Display help.

Examples:
  hxbuild -t:Hx_NetBuild
  hxbuild --exe "C:\Program Files\dotnet\dotnet.exe" -t:Hx_NetBuild -p:Hx_Run_Number=123
